name: Analyze current Power BI report page
prompt: You are analyzing a Power BI report screenshot. Return ONLY valid JSON with no markdown or explanation. Schema: {"page_title": string, "page_mode": "viewing|editing", "visual_count": number, "visuals": [{"position": "top-left|top-center|top-right|mid-left|mid-center|mid-right|bottom-left|bottom-center|bottom-right", "visual_type": string, "title": string, "has_data": boolean, "has_error": boolean}], "slicers": [{"label": string, "selected_value": string}], "layout_issues": [string], "summary": string}

name: Detect visual errors
prompt: You are a Power BI diagnostics assistant. Examine this screenshot for any visual errors, broken states, or loading failures. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"has_errors": boolean, "errors": [{"visual_title": string, "error_text": string, "position": string, "likely_cause": "dax_error|relationship_missing|data_type_mismatch|filter_context|timeout|unknown", "suggested_fix": string}], "warning_count": number, "warnings": [string]}

name: Inspect selected visual
prompt: You are inspecting a selected Power BI visual. A visual should be highlighted or have selection handles visible. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"visual_selected": boolean, "visual_type": string, "visual_title": string, "field_wells": {"axis": [string], "values": [string], "legend": [string], "tooltips": [string], "details": [string], "filters": [string]}, "visible_labels": [string], "formatting_notes": [string], "recommendations": [string]}

name: Recommend better layout
prompt: You are a Power BI report design expert. Analyze this report page layout and recommend improvements. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"current_layout_score": number, "issues": [{"issue": string, "severity": "high|medium|low", "fix": string}], "recommended_layout": {"kpi_row": string, "primary_visual": string, "secondary_visual": string, "detail_visual": string, "slicer_placement": string}, "whitespace_utilization": "poor|acceptable|good|excellent", "visual_hierarchy_rating": "poor|acceptable|good|excellent", "actionable_steps": [string]}

name: Detect filter and slicer state
prompt: You are reading the filter and slicer state from a Power BI screenshot. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"slicers": [{"label": string, "type": "dropdown|list|date_range|numeric_range|tile", "selected_values": [string], "is_default": boolean}], "filter_pane_visible": boolean, "filter_pane_filters": [{"field": string, "operator": string, "value": string, "scope": "visual|page|report|drillthrough"}], "active_filter_count": number, "no_filter_risk": boolean}

name: Detect field wells if visible
prompt: You are reading the Power BI Visualizations pane field wells. Look for the Build tab section showing Axis, Values, Legend, Tooltips, Details, or similar. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"pane_visible": boolean, "build_tab_active": boolean, "visual_type": string, "wells": {"axis": [string], "values": [string], "legend": [string], "tooltips": [string], "details": [string], "small_multiples": [string], "play_axis": [string]}, "empty_wells": [string], "recommendations": [string]}

name: Diagnose why a visual looks wrong
prompt: You are a Power BI troubleshooting expert. Analyze this screenshot to diagnose why a visual may be showing incorrect, unexpected, or confusing data. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"visual_identified": string, "suspected_issues": [{"issue": string, "category": "filter_context|relationship|dax_logic|data_quality|visual_type|formatting", "confidence": number, "diagnostic_steps": [string], "likely_fix": string}], "needs_dax_review": boolean, "needs_model_review": boolean, "needs_data_review": boolean}

name: Generate action plan from screenshot
prompt: You are a Power BI automation assistant. Given this screenshot and the user goal provided after this prompt, generate a precise step-by-step action plan. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"summary": string, "preconditions": [string], "steps": [{"n": number, "action": "click|type|key|scroll|wait|screenshot|vision|drag|right_click|double_click", "target": string, "value": string, "description": string, "requires_approval": boolean, "risk": "low|medium|high", "post_wait_ms": number}], "estimated_duration_seconds": number, "risk_level": "low|medium|high", "rollback_steps": [string]}

name: Compare before and after screenshots
prompt: You are comparing two Power BI screenshots to verify a change was applied correctly. The first image is BEFORE and the second is AFTER. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"change_detected": boolean, "changes": [{"element": string, "before": string, "after": string, "change_type": "added|removed|modified|moved|resized"}], "intended_change_applied": boolean, "unintended_changes": [string], "verification_result": "success|partial|failed", "notes": string}

name: Extract visible business fields and measures
prompt: You are extracting all visible business field names and measure names from a Power BI report screenshot. Look at axis labels, legend labels, card titles, matrix headers, tooltip names, and slicer labels. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"fields": [{"name": string, "type": "dimension|measure|date|key|unknown", "table_hint": string, "visible_in": string}], "measure_count": number, "dimension_count": number, "date_fields": [string], "possible_fact_tables": [string], "possible_dim_tables": [string]}
